'''ây-v-f''' ('''yavafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moistify|moistify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moistify|moistify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-v-f
|-
! Lemma
| yavafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavafithi|yavafithi]] || [[word:yavafiji|yavafiji]] || [[word:yavafishi|yavafishi]] || [[word:yavafi|yavafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavafuthuth|yavafuthuth]] || [[word:yavafujuj|yavafujuj]] || [[word:yavafushush|yavafushush]] || [[word:yavaf|yavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavafuthu|yavafuthu]] || [[word:yavafuju|yavafuju]] || [[word:yavafushu|yavafushu]] || [[word:yavafu|yavafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavafufuth|yavafufuth]] || [[word:yavafufuj|yavafufuj]] || [[word:yavafufush|yavafufush]] || [[word:yavafuf|yavafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavafethe|yavafethe]] || [[word:yavafeje|yavafeje]] || [[word:yavafeshe|yavafeshe]] || [[word:yavafe|yavafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavafothoth|yavafothoth]] || [[word:yavafojoj|yavafojoj]] || [[word:yavafoshosh|yavafoshosh]] || [[word:yavaf|yavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavafotho|yavafotho]] || [[word:yavafojo|yavafojo]] || [[word:yavafosho|yavafosho]] || [[word:yavafo|yavafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavafofoth|yavafofoth]] || [[word:yavafofoj|yavafofoj]] || [[word:yavafofosh|yavafofosh]] || [[word:yavafof|yavafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavafĂŠthĂŠ|yavafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yavafĂŠjĂŠ|yavafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yavafĂŠshĂŠ|yavafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yavafĂŠ|yavafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavafathath|yavafathath]] || [[word:yavafajaj|yavafajaj]] || [[word:yavafashash|yavafashash]] || [[word:yavaf|yavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavafatha|yavafatha]] || [[word:yavafaja|yavafaja]] || [[word:yavafasha|yavafasha]] || [[word:yavafa|yavafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavafafath|yavafafath]] || [[word:yavafafaj|yavafafaj]] || [[word:yavafafash|yavafafash]] || [[word:yavafaf|yavafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yavafasha|yavafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyavafasha|goyavafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyavafasha|gokiyavafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yavafnĂŒsha|yavafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyavafnknĂŒsha|goyavafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavafnĂŒsha|gokiyavafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yavafshĂ«sha|yavafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyavafnkshĂ«sha|goyavafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyavafshĂ«sha|gokiyavafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavafrosha|yavafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavafnkrosha|goyavafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavafrosha|gokiyavafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yavafmusha|yavafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavafnkmusha|goyavafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavafmusha|gokiyavafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yavafsherasha|yavafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyavafnksherasha|goyavafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyavafsherasha|gokiyavafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yavafngasha|yavafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyavafnkngasha|goyavafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyavafngasha|gokiyavafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yavafyasha|yavafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyavafnkyasha|goyavafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyavafyasha|gokiyavafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yavafyamasha|yavafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyavafnkyamasha|goyavafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyavafyamasha|gokiyavafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavafnĂŒshĂ«sha|yavafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyavafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyavafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavafnĂŒrosha|yavafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavafnknĂŒrosha|goyavafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavafnĂŒrosha|gokiyavafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavafnĂŒmusha|yavafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavafnknĂŒmusha|goyavafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavafnĂŒmusha|gokiyavafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavafshĂ«nĂŒsha|yavafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyavafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyavafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavafshĂ«rosha|yavafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavafnkshĂ«rosha|goyavafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavafshĂ«rosha|gokiyavafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavafshĂ«musha|yavafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavafnkshĂ«musha|goyavafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavafshĂ«musha|gokiyavafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavafronĂŒsha|yavafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavafnkronĂŒsha|goyavafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavafronĂŒsha|gokiyavafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavafroshĂ«sha|yavafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavafnkroshĂ«sha|goyavafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavafroshĂ«sha|gokiyavafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavafromusha|yavafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavafnkromusha|goyavafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavafromusha|gokiyavafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavafmunĂŒsha|yavafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavafnkmunĂŒsha|goyavafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavafmunĂŒsha|gokiyavafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavafmushĂ«sha|yavafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavafnkmushĂ«sha|goyavafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavafmushĂ«sha|gokiyavafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavafmurosha|yavafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavafnkmurosha|goyavafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavafmurosha|gokiyavafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yavaf|yavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠvĂŠf|yĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyavaf|hoyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠvĂŠf|hoyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyavaf|hohoyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠvĂŠf|hohoyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyavaf|nĂŒyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŒyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyavaf|nĂŒnĂŒyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyavaf|nĂŻyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŻyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyavaf|nĂŻnĂŻyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyavaf|luyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠvĂŠf|luyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyavaf|luluyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠvĂŠf|luluyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyavaf|liyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠvĂŠf|liyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyavaf|liliyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠvĂŠf|liliyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyavaf|koyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠvĂŠf|koyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyavaf|kokoyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠvĂŠf|kokoyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyavaf|keyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠvĂŠf|keyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyavaf|kekeyavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠvĂŠf|kekeyĂŠvĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
